CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2008 Continued To Jul-03-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-13-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Leticia Perez, CSR #7782.

Joseph H. Schieffer, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Design Center, LLC.
Martha Thompson, Senior Vice President for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Buccola Showrooms, LLC.
Amended default entered against defendant on March 11, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on March 11, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Design Center, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Buccola Showrooms, LLC as follows:

Damages/Principal - $104,346.65.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,307.05.
Attorney's Fees - $4,732.00.
Costs - $430.92, for a total of $116,816.62.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
